tasks.title: UI/UX Professional Polish
tasks.description: Refine the CSS on the checkout page to ensure it strictly follows professional international standards (clean lines, high contrast) and remove any lingering complex aesthetic elements.

tasks.title: MongoDB Query Optimization
tasks.description: Refactor the database queries used for product filtering to ensure sub-100ms response times for the user-facing store.

tasks.title: Component Library Modularization
tasks.description: Extract repeated UI elements (buttons, product cards, inputs) into a clean, reusable component directory to streamline future builds.

tasks.title: Order Management Dashboard
tasks.description: Develop a simple administrative view that allows for easy toggling of order statuses (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered).

tasks.title: Inventory Sync Verification
tasks.description: Ensure the database logic correctly updates stock levels immediately after a successful transaction to prevent over-selling.

tasks.title: Error Logging Integration
tasks.description: Implement a basic error tracking service (or local logging system) to capture and categorize failed requests in the production environment.

tasks.title: Deployment Workflow Automation
tasks.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline or a streamlined build-and-deploy script to minimize the time between pushing code and site updates.

tasks.title: Refactoring Legacy Logic
tasks.description: Identify the oldest module in the codebase and refactor it to align with the current, more modular standards you are using for newer components.
